stemHtml: The indication of the directional gyro is valid only for a limited period of time. The causes of this inaccuracy are rotation of the Earth and…

options.a: the aircraft`s movement over the surface of the Earth.
options.b: the aircraft`s movement over the surface of the Earth, and the vertical component of the Earth`s magnetic field.
options.c: longitudinal accelerations, and the vertical component of the Earth`s magnetic field.
options.d: longitudinal accelerations, and the aircraft`s movement over the surface of the Earth.
